smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: Runtime path parsing failures must return rest.ErrorResponse with invalid_argument before handler success output is written.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Treat malformed path identifiers as stable client errors and assert the ErrorResponse code/status instead of parsing text.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous route binding path active until path parse failures and OpenAPI path parameters both pass the runtime golden.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: Runtime query validation failures and OpenAPI query parameter constraints must describe the same min/max boundary.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Use the field-level validation failure to map query errors to client-side retry guidance.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous query DTO or validation tag set until query runtime and schema evidence agree.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: Required header validation must fail through rest.ErrorResponse and the OpenAPI parameter must remain required.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Require clients and gateways to send the documented header before retrying the request.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous header contract until runtime required-header checks and OpenAPI metadata converge.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: JSON decode failures must use the same rest.ErrorResponse envelope as validation failures without field-level validation entries.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Classify malformed JSON as a non-retryable client payload error and preserve the envelope status/code.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Route traffic to the previous decoder behavior until malformed body smoke and schema request-body evidence pass.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: Portable validate tags must drive both runtime field failures and OpenAPI schema enum/range metadata.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Use the fields array to surface the rejected field and allowed rule to API consumers.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Revert the DTO tag change or mark it as a breaking API change when runtime fields and OpenAPI schema diverge.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: Project validator adapters must map custom validation failures into stable ErrorResponse fields without changing the root module dependency graph.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Expose adapter failures as client validation feedback while keeping project-specific validator dependencies outside gofly root.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable the custom adapter or pin the generated project validator until adapter failures return the stable envelope.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: OpenAPI request body, parameters, and default error responses must mirror the runtime binding sources and rest.ErrorResponse schema.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Use the OpenAPI schema as the contract for SDK/client generation only after the schema golden passes.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Do not publish the generated OpenAPI document until schema golden and runtime golden both pass.

smokeCases.alignmentInvariant: Generated production services must expose /openapi.json and return rest.ErrorResponse invalid_argument for invalid requests.
smokeCases.consumerAction: Treat generated service smoke as release evidence before adopting the scaffold in production.
smokeCases.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the prior generated scaffold snapshot until OpenAPI endpoint and invalid request smoke pass together.
